{{Infobox concept
| name = Engineer
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

''See also: [[Engineer Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[The Engineer]] is a specialized role on the ship known as [[The Last Horizon]], typically filled by an [[Aether Technician]] or someone possessing exceptional compatibility with [[Aethertech]]. This position is vital for the ship's functionality, as an Engineer can activate internal systems and drones, improve the efficiency of repairs, and manage various facilities. While the ship's spirit can remain operational under damage until total failure, its capabilities and certain facilities are more restricted without an Engineer present. The final selection for this role is determined by the crew and the [[Captain]], though the ship itself may offer its opinion on a candidate. [[Mell]] is identified as the Engineer for [[The Last Horizon]], serving as a master [[Aether Technician]] with a unique gift for working with androids and humanoid robotics.}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[The Engineer]] position is for [[Aether]] [[Technicians]] or those with exceptional compatibility for [[Aethertech]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c16">''The Captain'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|An [[Engineer]] is a role or profession that can be filled by candidates.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c35">''The Captain'', chapter 35</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[The Engineer]] is one of the dark tablets on the ship's walls.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c41">''The Captain'', chapter 41</ref>}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|A master [[Aether Technician]] with a specialized gift for androids, the Engineer possesses the ability to integrate nearly any system into a humanoid robot. When [[Doctor Mell]] inquires about the role, it is revealed that this individual has the capability to return the [[Horizon]] to prime condition. As the crew finds themselves needing an Engineer to escape the system, the Engineer joins them as a new member of the team.}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[The Engineer]] is located with [[Doctor Mell]] and can return [[Horizon]] to prime condition.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c2">''The Engineer'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[The Engineer]] is a master [[Aether Technician]] whose gift is androids.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c10">''The Engineer'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[The Engineer]] can integrate almost any system into a humanoid robot.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The crew needs an [[Engineer]] to get out of the system.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c17">''The Engineer'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[The Engineer]] is a new member of the crew.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c19">''The Engineer'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[The Engineer]] is a role or title that [[Mell]] asks about.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c19" />}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Shyrax addresses the [[Engineer]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c10">''The Pilot'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[The Engineer]] is a character mentioned by [[Doctor Cryce]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c18">''The Pilot'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[The Engineer]] is a character who deploys drones.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c25">''The Pilot'', chapter 25</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|“Not to rush you,” I said, “but we do need an Engineer if we’re going to get out of this system.”<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c17" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon concepts]]
[[Category:Titles]]
